top3.sql:
SELECT 
    strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.birthday)) AS age
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.sprint_speed >= 97
  AND pa.date >= '2013-01-01'
  AND pa.date <= '2015-12-31'
GROUP BY p.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.birthday)) AS age
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.sprint_speed >= 97
  AND pa.date >= '2013-01-01'
  AND pa.date <= '2015-12-31'
GROUP BY p.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(p.birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.sprint_speed >= 97
  AND pa.date >= '2013-01-01'
  AND pa.date <= '2015-12-31'
GROUP BY p.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday)) - 
    (CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.birthday) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS current_age
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.sprint_speed >= 97
  AND pa.date >= '2013-01-01'
  AND pa.date <= '2015-12-31'
GROUP BY p.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.birthday)) AS age
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.sprint_speed >= 97
  AND pa.date >= '2013-01-01'
  AND pa.date <= '2015-12-31'
GROUP BY p.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(p.birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.sprint_speed >= 97
  AND pa.date >= '2013-01-01'
  AND pa.date <= '2015-12-31'
GROUP BY p.player_api_id;

    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday)) - 
    (CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.birthday) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS current_age

final.sql:
SELECT 
    strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.birthday)) AS age
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.sprint_speed >= 97
  AND pa.date >= '2013-01-01'
  AND pa.date <= '2015-12-31'
GROUP BY p.player_api_id;
